news.title: AI Smart Glasses Become 2026's 'Must-Have' Tech
news.title_cn: AI眼镜成为2026年“必备”科技单品
news.summary: Sales of AI smart glasses in Huaqiangbei have surged by 70% to 80% in the last two months, boosted by their inclusion in the government's 2026 'trade-in' subsidy catalog. Budget-friendly models start around 150 yuan.

news.title: Huaqiangbei Issues First Official AI Recommendation List
news.title_cn: 华强北发布首份官方AI推荐榜单
news.summary: The list highlights eight hardware categories driving pre-holiday sales: Drones, Robotics, AI Smart Glasses, AI Toys, AI Watches, AI Translation Devices, AI Learning Devices, and AI Speakers.

news.title: Vintage CCD Cameras Make a Comeback, Prices Soar
news.title_cn: 复古CCD相机价格飙升，成华强北新宠
news.summary: Once sold by the kilogram as 'e-waste', CCD digital cameras are now fetching upwards of 2,500 yuan, driven by Gen Z and Millennials seeking a retro aesthetic.

news.title: Huaqiangbei Reports 35% Revenue Jump During Chinese New Year
news.title_cn: 华强北春节假期营收同比增长35%
news.summary: Overall technology sales rose by more than 30% in the two months prior, with AI smart glasses up 70-80% and drones/robots up 30-50%.

news.title: AI Products Now Represent 41% of Huaqiangbei's Product Mix
news.title_cn: AI产品在华强北产品结构中的占比已达41%
news.summary: The share of AI products in Huaqiangbei's overall product mix has grown from about 12% in 2023 to 41% in 2026, signaling a major market repositioning.

news.title: Foreign Buyer Traffic Surges Over 30% During Canton Fair
news.title_cn: 广交会期间华强北外籍客流量激增超30%
news.summary: During the Canton Fair, foreign visitor traffic in Huaqiangbei increased by over 30% year-on-year, with AI products being their top interest.

news.title: Mid-Range Smartphone Prices Rise Up to 30%
news.title_cn: 华强北中低端手机涨幅最高达30%
news.summary: Mid-to-low-end smartphones from brands like OPPO, vivo, and Honor have seen price increases of 15% to 30% (200-500 yuan), driven by rising memory chip costs.

news.title: Huaqiangbei Releases AI Sales Heat Map
news.title_cn: 华强北发布AI硬件全球销售热力图
news.summary: The color-coded map shows drones are 'red-hot' and learning gadgets are surging due to back-to-school shopping.

news.title: Over 7,000 International Buyers Visit Daily
news.title_cn: 华强北日均国际买家超7000人次
news.summary: The district records an average daily footfall of about 750,000 people, with foreign buyers exceeding 7,000, doubling the previous year's figure.

news.title: Huaqiang South Emerges as a Hub for Used Electronics
news.title_cn: 华强南崛起成为中国二手消费电子集散中心
news.summary: Huaqiang South has become China's largest cluster for used consumer electronics, with an annual transaction volume surpassing 20 billion yuan (US$2.91 billion).

news.title: DDR5 Memory Prices Plunge Nearly 30%
news.summary: After months of speculation, DDR5 16GB modules have fallen from 1,600-1,800 CNY to around 1,200 CNY. Used phone buyback prices also dropped about 30%.

news.title: RoboSense Reports 1,458% Growth in Robotics LiDAR
news.title_cn: 速腾聚创机器人LiDAR业务增长1458%
news.summary: Shenzhen-based RoboSense announced a massive 1,458% increase in LiDAR sensor sales for robotics in Q1 2026, driven by autonomous delivery robots and humanoids.

news.title: Chip Price Hikes Hit Huaqiangbei: TI, NXP Up to 85%
news.summary: More than 14 major suppliers have announced price increases of up to 85% on analog and power management components, driven by AI demand and rising copper costs.

news.title: Shenzhen Humanoid Robot 'Flash' Breaks World Record
news.title_cn: 深圳人形机器人“闪光”破世界纪录
news.summary: The humanoid robot 'Flash' from Shenzhen Honor Smart Technology completed a half-marathon in 50 minutes 26 seconds in autonomous mode, proving local navigation and servo motor excellence.

news.title: New E-Scooter Parking Rules Around Huaqiangbei
news.title_cn: 华强北周边电动滑板车停放新规
news.summary: Shenzhen has installed mandatory parking zones for e-scooters. Illegal parking is now heavily fined. Visitors are advised to use the metro (Huaqiang North or Huaqiang Road stations).
